title: Instagram Scraper Configuration
description: Scrape Instagram accounts by keywords and location.

keyword.title: Keyword
keyword.description: The main keyword to search for (e.g., 'cafe', 'giftshop').

location.title: Location
location.description: Optional location to append to the keyword (e.g., 'London', 'New York').

maxAccounts.title: Max Accounts
maxAccounts.description: Max accounts to collect per search (Optional). Set to 0 for unlimited.
